articles.title: In Huge Precedent, IRS Says It Will Not Tax Unsold, Staked Crypto
articles.description: In court filings expected to made public Thursday, the IRS declared it would refund $3,293 in income tax to a Nashville couple who had paid the amount on 8,876 Tezos tokens obtained through staking—a huge precedent for how crypto assets may be taxed moving forward.
